mapper.sql: rwi.re_id as rri_id, rwi.company, rwi.post, rwi.start_time, rwi.end_time, rwi.salary_old, rwi.reasons_leaving, rwi.witness, rwi.tele, rwi.remarks, rwi.attribute1, rwi.attribute2, rwi.attribute3, rwi.enabled_flag, rwi.id, rwi.create_by, rwi.update_time, rwi.create_time, rwi.update_by

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rri_id, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.salary_old as ${tAlias}_salary_old, ${tAlias}.reasons_leaving as ${tAlias}_reasons_leaving, ${tAlias}.witness as ${tAlias}_witness, ${tAlias}.tele as ${tAlias}_tele, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into re_workhistory_interface (re_id, company, post, start_time, end_time, salary_old, reasons_leaving, witness, tele, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, update_time, create_time, update_by) values (#{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{salaryOld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{reasonsLeaving,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{witness,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update re_workhistory_interface set re_id = #{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, salary_old = #{salaryOld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, reasons_leaving = #{reasonsLeaving,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, witness = #{witness,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tele = #{tele,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
